methods.description: TGA analysis was performed to assess the thermal stability and composition of the sample by measuring weight changes upon heating.

steps.description: TGA analysis was performed at a heating rate of 10 °C/min up to 700 °C in a flow of nitrogen at 20 mL/min using TGA-50H, SHIMADZU, Kyoto, Japan.
steps.searchable_summary: perform TGA analysis with specified heating rate and nitrogen flow

methods.description: In vivo studies were conducted to evaluate the effects of the treatment on male Sprague-Dawley rats under controlled conditions.

steps.description: Clinically normal male Sprague-Dawley rats weighing approximately 150-200 g at the start of the experiment were used.
steps.searchable_summary: select and prepare Sprague-Dawley rats for experiment

steps.description: The rats were housed at a temperature of 25 ± 3 °C and were maintained under a natural daily 12 h light/dark cycle.
steps.searchable_summary: house rats under controlled temperature and light conditions

steps.description: They had unlimited access to a standard laboratory diet and tap water.
steps.searchable_summary: provide rats with standard diet and water

steps.description: The rats were left for at least one week prior to the experiment to acclimate.
steps.searchable_summary: acclimate rats for one week before experiment

steps.description: To reduce circadian effects, all experiments were carried out between 8:00 a.m. and 12:00 p.m.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct experiments during specified time to reduce circadian effects

methods.description: The in vitro release study was conducted to evaluate the release profile of MTF from various encapsulation platforms under simulated gastrointestinal conditions.

steps.description: The in vitro release of MTF from these formulations was carried out under SGF and SIF conditions, simulating the GI tract at 37 ± 0.5 °C.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct in vitro MTF release study under SGF and SIF conditions

steps.description: Various kinetic models were fitted to the experimental data obtained in Figure 6, and the results were summarized in Table S1, ESI.
steps.searchable_summary: fit kinetic models to release data and summarize results
